about:
My name is Marc Tremblay. I'm a Game Programmer, a Teaching Assistant and a recent Computer Science graduate from University of Ontario Institute of Technology. My passion for software development started back in high school when I joined my school's robotics team and a youth education program about video game development called ProtoLaunch.
 After this, I went to UOIT for Game Development and Entrepreneurship and switched to Computer Science to gain a more focused education in software development. I've had summer positions at Red Meat Games and Blot Interactive, and have worked on a number of school and personal projects most of which are (going to be) detailed below.
